content: Name: Tatsuya Gima E-mail: gima [at] nagoya-u.jp Affiliation: Doctoral Course of Department of Mathematical Informatics, Graduate School of Informatics, Nagoya University. Supervisor: Yota Otachi Career April 2022 – Now: Doctoral Course of Department of Mathematical Informatics, Graduate School of Informatics, Nagoya University. December 2020 – Now: Graduate Program for Lifestyle Revolution based on Transdisciplinary Mobility Innovation (TMI) in Nagoya University. April 2020 – March 2022: Master’s Course of Department of Mathematical Informatics, Graduate School of Informatics, Nagoya University (Master of Informatics) April 2016 – March 2020: Department of Computer Science and Electrical Engineering, Kumamoto University (Bachelor of Engineering) Awards March 2022: IEICE General Conference COMP Students Symposium Best Paper Award
